revision.comment: imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Created page with "<noinclude> [[ja:template:名水百選]] [[Category:Templates to be translated]] </noinclude>"
Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration
Bot: wrap 1 stray tag(s) in noinclude [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23124421395|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text: <noinclude> [[ja:template:名水百選]] [[Category:Templates to be translated]] </noinclude> <noinclude> [[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]] </noinclude>

<noinclude> [[ja:template:名水百選]] [[Category:Templates to be translated]]
[[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]] </noinclude>

revision.comment: [[Project:History cleanup|Offloading history due to miraheze stability concerns]] many contributors, see [https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=100_Famous_Springs_of_Japan here] for full history [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
<!-- History offloaded: due to miraheze stability concerns, the edit history of this page has been offloaded to the XML archive. Last refreshed: [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]] --> <noinclude> [[ja:template:名水百選]] [[Category:Templates to be translated]]
[[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]] </noinclude> <noinclude> [[Category:Pages without wikidata]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]] </noinclude>
